chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No. S-932 of 2022 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 10.08.2023 None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Zahoor Shah, Addl. Prosecutor General, Sindh. Mr. Ghulam Akbar Uqaili, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh along with SIP Shaukat Ali of P.S Sukhan, Karachi. -x-x-x-x-x- SIP Shaukat Ali of P.S Sukhan, Karachi present, files statement along with a copy of FIR No.417/2022, taken on record. Perusal of file reveals that the petitioners as well as their counsel are not appearing since last two consecutive dates. FIR No.417/2022 was registered with P.S Sukhan Karachi under Section 489-F PPC against petitioner No.1 and no case has been reported to have been registered against petitioner No.2. Therefore, purpose of instant petition particularly in terms of its prayer clause seems to have been achieved. Consequently, instant petition is hereby disposed of along with pending application(s), if any. JUDGE Zulfiqar/P.A
